Script Text: <break time="1.0s" />Well now, gather 'round!<break time="0.5s" /> It's about that time!<break time="0.5s" /> We're switchin' gears in the next game from Music to a good ol' fashioned, standard game of Bingo... presented by AMI Entertainment!<break time="0.5s" /> Just you, me, and the numbers!<break time="0.5s" /> If you ain't got a card yet, go ahead and wave down your host! <break time="0.5s" /> And before we get to callin', make sure you ask 'em what the winning pattern is tonight!<break time="1.5s" /> Alright... let's see who the lucky ones are!<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />Five numbers down!<break time="0.5s" /> We're just gettin' the dust off the tires!<break time="0.5s" /> If you just walked in, it ain't too late!<break time="0.5s" /> Grab your host and get a card!<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Fifteen numbers called!<break time="0.5s" /> Y'all are lookin' mighty focused out there!<break time="0.5s" /> Keep your eyes on the board!<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />Twenty-five numbers in the bucket!<break time="0.5s" /> Somebody out there's gotta be gettin' close!<break time="0.5s" /> Don't be shy when you hit it... let us hear ya!<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Thirty-five numbers in the books!<break time="0.5s" /> We're about halfway down the trail!<break time="0.5s" /> Anybody sweatin' yet?!<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Fifty-five numbers!<break time="0.5s" /> The air is gettin' a little thin in here!<break time="0.5s" /> Double check those cards, folks!<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />Well, that's seventy-five numbers!<break time="0.5s" /> The bucket is empty!<break time="0.5s" /> If nobody hollered bingo, we might need to check your hearing!<break time="0.5s" /> Thanks for playin' with us tonight, and a big tip of the hat to AMI Entertainment!<break time="0.5s" /> Stick around, we'll have more fun comin' up!<break time="5.0s" />
